description_long: This kiosk features a two-level structure with a prominent overhanging flat roof and a wraparound balcony on the upper level. The main body is constructed from a dark, textured material, likely concrete or stucco, with white trim accentuating the roof and balcony edges. The front is accessible via a short staircase leading to a gated entry, and the upper level is enclosed by metal railings. The kiosk sits on a square, tiled platform that extends beyond the building's footprint, providing a stable base. There are no visible windows or signage, and the design is clean and modern with geometric lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, two-level kiosk with a flat overhanging roof, wraparound balcony, and gated entry, built from dark concrete and white trim on a tiled platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staircase, gated entry, and the layered balcony with white trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase, metal railings, and the depth of the overhanging roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back wall and the layered structure without visible entry points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the balcony railings and the structural supports beneath the roof.
attribute_door_configuration: single open gated entry at front, no visible doors
attribute_roof_design: Flat overhanging roof with white trim, constructed from solid material, no visible skylights or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: modern minimalist with geometric lines and functional design
